title: Google debuts new AI models, personal AI agents in effort to keep pace with OpenAI and Anthropic
summary_full: Google made a number of AI announcements at its annual developer conference, rolling out more-advanced models and agentic tools for its expansive user base.
summary_public: Google made a number of AI announcements at its annual developer conference, rolling out more-advanced models and agentic tools for its expansive user base.
